/usr/bin/c++ -g -O0 -Wall -Wextra CMakeFiles/CodeForge.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CodeForge.dir/src/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CodeForge.dir/src/BuildSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CodeForge.dir/src/CodeEditor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CodeForge.dir/src/CompilerEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CodeForge.dir/src/FileManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CodeForge.dir/src/ProjectManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CodeForge.dir/src/SettingsManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CodeForge.dir/src/UIManager.cpp.o -o bin/CodeForge  -lglfw libimgui.a -ldl -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so -lglfw
